title: pavonia stipularis
intro: Pavonia stipularis, also known as Rock Rose or Rose Mallow, is a flowering plant species native to tropical America, belonging to the Malvaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and alkaloids. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating respiratory issues. Pavonia stipularis can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine.
